source.name: Finology Select
source.document: Flipkart Axis Credit Card Update: Lounge Access Removed & More

faqTemplateAnswers.Is this card lifetime free?: No, it has a ₹500 joining fee and ₹500 annual fee (from year two), waived if you spend ₹3,50,000 or more (excluding rent and wallet loads) in the preceding year.
faqTemplateAnswers.Is it worth it?: Yes for regular Flipkart/Myntra shoppers — 5% on Flipkart, 7.5% on Myntra and 4% on preferred partners like Swiggy and Uber add up quickly, though the quarterly caps and the 2025 removal of lounge access have reduced its overall value.
faqTemplateAnswers.Who should get this card?: Frequent Flipkart, Myntra, Cleartrip, Swiggy or Uber users who want strong cashback specifically on those platforms.
faqTemplateAnswers.Does it support UPI?: No, the standard Visa version cannot be linked to UPI apps.
faqTemplateAnswers.Can I get lounge access with this card?: No. Complimentary domestic lounge access was discontinued for this card effective 20 June 2025.
faqTemplateAnswers.What income is required to qualify?: Axis Bank doesn't publish an exact minimum, but as an entry-level card it typically requires a steady monthly income and a reasonable credit score.
faqTemplateAnswers.Who should avoid this card?: Shoppers who rarely use Flipkart, Myntra or Cleartrip won't get much beyond the base 1%, and travellers who valued the now-discontinued lounge access should look elsewhere.
faqTemplateAnswers.What are the best alternatives?: Axis ACE for broader everyday cashback (bills, Swiggy, Zomato, Ola), or Amazon Pay ICICI Credit Card if you shop more on Amazon than Flipkart.
